chatInjectDelay.name: Chat Button Inject Delay (ms)
chatInjectDelay.hint: Time in milliseconds to wait after a chat message renders before injecting forced movement buttons.

installMacros.name: Install API Macros
installMacros.label: Install Macros
installMacros.hint: Creates a folder of ready-to-use macros for every module API function in your Macros sidebar.

macroPromptMode.name: Sample Macro Import Prompt
macroPromptMode.hint: Controls when Draw Steel: Combat Tools prompts the GM to import sample macros on initialization.

choice.skipUpdate: Ask only when the module updates

quickStrikeCompat.name: Draw Steel: Quick Strike
quickStrikeCompat.hint: Routes collision and fall damage through Quick Strike's socket so it appears in its chat log with source info and its undo button. DSCT's undo still handles position and status restoration independently.

forcedMovementEnabled.name: Enable Forced Movement
forcedMovementEnabled.hint: Enables the Forced Movement panel and all push/pull/slide mechanics.

animationStepDelay.name: Animation Step Delay (ms)
animationStepDelay.hint: Time in milliseconds between each square of animated forced movement. Set to 0 to disable animation.

fallDamageCap.name: Fall Damage Cap
fallDamageCap.hint: Maximum damage a creature can take from a single fall.

gmBypassesRangeCheck.name: GM Bypasses Range Check
gmBypassesRangeCheck.hint: When enabled, the GM can execute forced movement from chat buttons regardless of range.

grabEnabled.name: Enable Grab System
grabEnabled.hint: Enables the Grab panel and all grab mechanics.

gmBypassesSizeCheck.name: GM Bypasses Size Check
gmBypassesSizeCheck.hint: When enabled, the GM can execute Knockback and Grab regardless of target size.

restrictGrabButtons.name: Restrict Manual Grab Buttons to GM
restrictGrabButtons.hint: If enabled, only the GM can see and click the Apply Grab and End Grab buttons in the Grab Panel.

grabbedBaneEnabled.name: Enable Grabbed Bane
grabbedBaneEnabled.hint: Edits abilities posted by a grabbed creature if they don't target their grabber to inflict 1 bane.

allowIllegalMovement.name: Allow Illegal Movement
allowIllegalMovement.hint: When enabled, movement that would normally be blocked (moving toward a fear source while frightened, or moving while grabbed) is allowed but a reminder notification is shown instead.

frightenedEnabled.name: Enable Frightened Automation
frightenedEnabled.hint: Applies bane/edge roll modifiers and movement restrictions for the DSCT Frightened condition. Replaces native frightened buttons in chat with our version.

tauntedEnabled.name: Enable Taunted Automation
tauntedEnabled.hint: Applies double-bane roll modifiers (with line-of-effect check) for the DSCT Taunted condition. Replaces native taunted buttons in chat with our version.

bleedingEnabled.name: Enable Bleeding Automation
bleedingEnabled.hint: Automatically handles the bleeding condition. When a bleeding creature uses a main action, triggered action ability, or makes a Might/Agility roll, it loses 1d6 + their level in stamina.

bleedingMode.name: Bleeding Damage Mode
bleedingMode.hint: Auto-Apply: rolls 1d6+1 and applies the damage immediately with an undo button. Manual: posts the roll for the GM/player to apply.

deathTrackerEnabled.name: Enable Death Tracker
deathTrackerEnabled.hint: Automatically removes dead enemies from combat, triggers a death animation, and places a skull marker.

deathAnimationDuration.name: Death Animation Duration (ms)
deathAnimationDuration.hint: How long the red fade-out animation lasts before the token is removed. Set to 0 to skip.

clearSkullsOnCombatEnd.name: Clear Skulls on Combat End
clearSkullsOnCombatEnd.hint: If enabled, all skull tiles placed during a combat encounter are deleted when combat ends.

clearEffectsOnRevive.name: Clear Effects on Revive
clearEffectsOnRevive.hint: If enabled, reviving a creature automatically removes all active conditions and effects (except core system states like Winded).

autoAssignDamagedMinion.name: Auto-Assign Damaged Minion on Death
autoAssignDamagedMinion.hint: When a squad takes damage that kills one or more minions, the minion that received the damage is pre-locked into the selection and cannot be deselected. If exactly one minion must die and the damaged minion is identifiable, the selection dialog is skipped entirely.

overrideMinionDefeat.name: Override Minion Defeat UI
overrideMinionDefeat.hint: Replace the Draw Steel system's minion defeat selection dialog with the Death Tracker's Power Word: Kill UI. When disabled, the system's built-in dialog is used instead.

autoSquadLabelsEnabled.name: Enable Squad Labels
autoSquadLabelsEnabled.hint: Automatically apply squad label icons to tokens when combat starts.

autoTriggeredActionsEnabled.name: Enable Triggered Action Tracker
autoTriggeredActionsEnabled.hint: Automatically place the Unspent Triggered Action effect on combatants when combat starts.

autoTriggeredActionsTarget.name: Triggered Action Tracker Targets
autoTriggeredActionsTarget.hint: Who should receive the Triggered Action tracker at the start of combat?

teleportEnabled.name: Enable Teleport Tool
teleportEnabled.hint: Adds a teleport button to the token controls for phasing tokens across the map.

judgementAutomation.name: Enable Judgement Button
judgementAutomation.hint: Injects a Judgement button into chat when the Judgement ability is used.

markAutomation.name: Enable Mark Buttons
markAutomation.hint: Injects Mark buttons into chat when mark abilities (Mark, Fog of War, etc.) are used.

aidAttackAutomation.name: Enable Aid Attack Button
aidAttackAutomation.hint: Injects an Aid Attack button into chat when the Aid Attack ability is used.

imNoThreatEnabled.name: Enable I'm No Threat Panel
imNoThreatEnabled.hint: Injects an I'm No Threat button into chat when the I'm No Threat ability is used.

intAnimalsMenu.name: I'm No Threat Animals
intAnimalsMenu.label: Configure Animals
intAnimalsMenu.hint: Edit the list of animal disguises (name, icon, emoji) available in the I'm No Threat panel.

wallBuilderSettings.name: Wall Builder Settings
wallBuilderSettings.label: Configure Wall Builder
wallBuilderSettings.hint: Adjust material costs, damage values, wall restrictions, and wall builder defaults.

keepInvisibleWhenBroken.name: Keep Invisible Wall Tiles Invisible When Broken
keepInvisibleWhenBroken.hint: If enabled, obstacle tiles tagged as invisible (e.g. converted walls created with the invisible option) remain at alpha 0 after being broken. Useful when you want no visual change on the canvas regardless of state.

showWallBuilderButton.name: Show Wall Builder Button
showWallBuilderButton.hint: Show the Wall Builder toolbar button in the Walls layer controls (GM only).

showForcedMovementButton.name: Show Forced Movement Button
showForcedMovementButton.hint: Show the Forced Movement toolbar button in the token controls.

showGrabButton.name: Show Grab Button
showGrabButton.hint: Show the Grab Panel toolbar button in the token controls.

showTeleportButton.name: Show Teleport Button
showTeleportButton.hint: Show the Teleport toolbar button in the token controls.

showPowerWordKillButton.name: Show Power Word Kill Button
showPowerWordKillButton.hint: Show the Power Word Kill toolbar button in the token controls (GM only).

showDamageConditionsButton.name: Show Damage & Conditions Button
showDamageConditionsButton.hint: Show the Damage & Conditions toolbar button in the token controls.

debugMode.name: Debug Mode
debugMode.hint: If enabled, verbose debug messages are printed to the browser console.

cornerCutMode.name: Corner Cut Movement
cornerCutMode.hint:
Collide on Corner Cuts (default): diagonal movement clipping a wall corner is allowed but triggers collision damage.
Block Corner Cutting: diagonal movement through a wall corner is forbidden entirely.

legacySingleCellCollisions.name: Legacy Single-Cell Collisions
legacySingleCellCollisions.hint: When enabled, forced movement collision uses only the top-left corner cell for all tokens regardless of size. Default (off) checks the full footprint for size 2+ tokens: multiple blockers each take damage once, the mover takes damage once; multiple breakable walls are each broken if movement permits, stopping at the hardest wall that cannot be broken.

allowCrookedPushPull.name: Wiggly Lines for Push/Pull
allowCrookedPushPull.hint: When enabled, Push and Pull are not restricted to a straight line during manual path selection. Houserule option, off by default.
